spec.name: In The Forest
spec.description: Here the field changes color, becoming almost transparent. Beyond, you think you can make out a few shapes, but nothing too terribly distinct. From the north comes the rushing sound of water, and through the trees you believe you can see a river cutting through the forest. The trail you are on leads north-south through the woods, following the energy barrier all along its length.

extra_descs.description: You can see a clearing beyond, the barrier not fully blocking out the area behind. You think it might be possible to push your way through, if the damn thing doesn't kill you first.
